subject: Cannot log into VPN after password reset
body: User reports being unable to connect to the VPN since their Active Directory password was reset yesterday. Error message: Authentication failed. Cisco AnyConnect client version 4.10.

subject: Laptop screen flickering and going black
body: My Dell XPS 15 screen has been flickering intermittently since this morning. It sometimes goes completely black for 2-3 seconds. The external monitor works fine.

subject: Ransomware alert on workstation WS-FIN-042
body: CRITICAL: CrowdStrike has detected ransomware activity on workstation WS-FIN-042. Files are being encrypted. The machine has been isolated from the network. Immediate response required.

subject: Need access to SharePoint project site
body: I need read access to the SharePoint site 'Project-Alpha-2025'. My manager Bob Williams has approved this request. Please grant access as soon as possible.

subject: Network drive Z: not mapping on startup
body: The Z: drive (\\fileserver01\shared) is no longer mapping automatically at login. This started after the group policy update last week. Affects all users in the Seattle office.

subject: Microsoft Office keeps crashing on launch
body: Word, Excel, and Outlook are all crashing immediately after launch. The error says 'Application cannot start' and references a corrupted DLL. I've tried restarting multiple times.

subject: New hire account setup - Robert Martinez starts Monday
body: New employee Robert Martinez (r.martinez@company.com) starts Monday 2025-01-20 in the Engineering department. Please create AD account, set up email, assign M365 E3 license, and grant access to standard engineering tools.

subject: Suspicious phishing email received
body: I received an email claiming to be from IT support asking for my login credentials. The sender address was it-support@c0mpany.com (note the zero). I did not click any links. Attaching the email headers.

subject: Printer on floor 3 not responding
body: The HP LaserJet Pro M404dn on the 3rd floor (IP: 192.168.3.45) is showing offline. I've tried power cycling. Print jobs are queuing but not printing. This affects 20 people.

subject: Request admin rights for software installation
body: I need temporary admin rights to install Wireshark and Python 3.12 for a security assessment project. My manager has approved this. Duration: 48 hours.
